What is trigger?
Trigger means that sign which reminds you of some work.

Three mother's ways to choose a trigger.
One, place the trigger based on your habit.
Like, when you reach office, silence your phone.
Two, time the trigger based on your habit.
Like, read a book at 10 o'clock in the night.
Three, event the trigger based on your habit.

Similarly, when the system breaks, how do we start again?
The system may fail, but not you.
It is the biggest victory to start again.
Suppose you had made the habit of waking up at 6 in the morning by 20 days.

The strategy of return.
1. No guilt rule.
Don't blame yourself.
It's for ordinary people.
Not for robots.
2. Restart small.
If you couldn't wake up at 6 in the morning, then get up at 6.
